urdu transliteration text:
Aal e ahmed jangalo main be rida hain be ridaThe family of Muhammad is being paraded without any veilEnglish Transliteration
@HujjatELC

Aal e ahmed jangalo main be rida hain be ridaZainab o kalsoom ka haiy Sar kula hai sar kula
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The family of Muhammad is being paraded without any veil,
Zainab and Kulsoom do not have any head covering

urdu transliteration text:
Shimar ka khaiyam main yun aake chadar cheiyna Hum na bhulay ge kabhi bhi Wa hijaba ki sada
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
In the wrath of Shimr, their veils have been snatched
We will not forget their cries of ‘wa hijaba’
Their journey is so difficult, their lamentation is continuous
